release_notes: Onboarding now runs end to end. Employment Hero self-setup completion is tracked automatically (a green EH ✓ badge), and crew contracts are signed in the app instead of by emailed Google Doc: marking a candidate Sent to EH now takes their commencement date and emails them a link to read and sign their contract, with a Contract ✓ badge and a View signed contract link for you. Candidates move to the new All Docs Received stage once both their EH setup and contract are in, and Convert is enabled only then — so no one is converted half-documented.
